title: Https://api.monday.com/v2/get_schema has empty content

posts.author: toshetah (Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
So far I was using https://api.monday.com/v2/get_schema endpoint to get the GraphQL schema. Currently this URL returns empty value (screenshot attached)
Is this the wrong source of the schema?
If not, is this going to be populated again?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @toshetah,

Do you still see that?

I am seeing the schema correctly.

Might have been a temporary issue

posts.author: toshetah (Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml: Now it is working correctly. Thanks @Matias.Monday!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Let me know if you need anything else @toshetah !
